# `api.sellers.get`

> `GET /Seller/{id}` — Catalog

**Python**

```python
api.sellers.get(seller_id: int) -> SellerExpandedDto
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab sellers get <seller_id>
```

Retrieve a single seller by ID.

Args:
    seller_id: Seller identifier.

Returns:
    SellerExpandedDto: Seller details with catalog associations.

## Response

Returns `SellerExpandedDto`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `int` | yes | Seller ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Seller name |
| `customerDisplayId` | `Optional[int]` | no | Customer-facing display ID |
| `isActive` | `Optional[bool]` | no | Whether seller is active |
| `displayId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Deprecated display identifier — always null per captured responses |
| `catalogs` | `Optional[list[CatalogDto]]` | no | Associated catalogs |
